question: Pre-monsoon Mango Showers are common in the coastal areas of :

options.2: Eastern part of the Deccan Plateau
options.3: Southern part of the Deccan Plateau

question: The most widespread forests in India are :

Match the following :
List I
(River)
a. Vamsadhara
b. Machkund
c. Gundlakamma
d. Pennar
List II
(Origin)
I. Nallamala hills
II. Nandidurga hills
III. Jayapur hills
IV. Mudugal hills
Codes :
a b c d
(1) I II III IV
(2) II I IV III
(3) IV III II I
(4) III IV I II
